smoke.label: Environment smoke test
smoke.description: Checks the container toolchain and mounted Gaia-ECS source without creating build output.

full.label: Clang and GCC matrix
full.description: Runs C++17/20/23 unit coverage plus debug and optimized sanitizer unit/performance coverage with both compilers.

clang.label: Clang and sanitizers
clang.description: Runs the Clang build, unit and performance tests, Address/Undefined sanitizers, and MemorySanitizer where supported.

gcc.label: GCC and sanitizers
gcc.description: Runs the GCC build, unit and performance tests, and Address/Undefined sanitizers.

cachegrind.label: Cachegrind duel
cachegrind.description: Builds the optimized duel benchmark and records Cachegrind read, write, and branch reports.
